features: 【Perfect Size】 Each birthday party bag measures 24x13x8CM (Length x Width x Height) and is made from high-quality paper, ensuring that it can hold up to all the treats and goodies that you want to put inside.

【Rainbow Colour】This pack of 20 small party paper bags with 20pcs "Thank You" stickers, the bags come in 10 vibrant colours , 2 of each colour, 20 in total : red, orange, yellow, light green, green, light blue, blue, hot pink, rose pink and purple. Add a splash of colour to your party or celebration with our Rainbow Paper Party Bags!

【Multi-Functional】Our Rainbow kids Party Gift Bags are not only colourful and festive, but also practical, reusable and and perfect for gift wrapping, these bags are perfect for any occasion, from birthday parties to baby showers, weddings, Christmas, Thanksgiving and more.

【Sturdy and Durable】Our empty birthday party paper bags are made from 80 gsm premium quality kraft paper, which is degradable, environmentally friendly and hygienic material. The paper is thick and durable, non-toxic, safe, recyclable and strong.

【Wide Application】A set of paper gift bags for small gifts, small toys, stationery, biscuits, sweets, can be used as buffet bags, gift bags, candy bags, party bags, snack bags, sandwich bags, takeaway bags, etc. It is very suitable for children's crafts and activities, such as handmade dolls, pinatas, paper crowns, wreaths, baskets, etc.
description: Product Description 20 Pack of Rainbow kids Party Bags - Colourful Paper Party Bags Brighten up your party with our Rainbow Paper Party Bags! Features: Colours: Red, Orange, Yellow, Light green, Green, Light blue, Blue, Hot pink, Rose pink and purple. Material: Fantastic quality paper party bags made from thick 80 GSM coloured white kraft paper Quantity: 20 small paper party bags = 2 bags of each colour Package includes: 20 x Paper party bags 20 x Thank You stickers Get yours today and make your party stand out with these colourful paper bags!
